---
title: "Aqualog_PARAFAC_Analysis"
author: "Tianyin Ouyang"
date: "2026-02-24"
output: github_document
---

## Introduction 

## Install and load required packages 
```{r install packages}
if (!require("staRdom")) install.packages("staRdom")
if (!require("remotes")) install.packages("remotes")

remotes::install_github("touyang98/General-Data-Analysis-Codes")
library(staRdom)
library(General-Data-Analysis-Codes)
```

## Read Aqualog data files 
Please save absorbance and eems data files into separate folders 
```{r read files}
## read absorbance data 
path_abs <- "PARAFAC_Data/Raw_Abs"
```
